# SecExternalFormat.formatWrappedSSH

**Case**

OpenSSH 1 format for wrapped symmetric and private keys.  OpenSSH is an OpenBSD implementation of the Secure Shell (SSH) protocol.

## Declaration

```swift
case formatWrappedSSH
```
